---
title: "BIOE 276 - Final Project"
format: html
editor: visual
authors: Sofia Rivas & Jocelyn Rojas
---

## Project Title

### Project Overview

#### Research Question

To what extent do biological and environmental variables predict sea urchin gonad index across kelp forests and urchin barrens, and which variables are the strongest predictors of gonad index?

#### Background

-   Why is this research question important?

#### Target Audience:

Recovery and restoration practitioners and researchers

### Exploratory Data Analyses

```{r}

# Loading Relevant Packages

```

#### Data Wrangling

```{r}
# Loading Data 
```
